title: Example of KRAS oncogene mutational regression and HLA haplotype characterization in oligo-metastatic colorectal cancer patient (ID: PAT2)
author: Alessandro Ottaiano
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: KRAS oncogene mutational regression from primary tumour to lung metastasis (evaluated through TSO500 panel, Illumina Novaseq 6000 platform) and HLA haplotype characterization (through PCR) in a representative oligo-metastatic colorectal cancer patient (ID: PAT2).
steps_raw: KRAS oncogene mutational regression from primary tumour to lung metastasis (evaluated through TSO500 panel, Illumina Novaseq 6000 platform) and HLA haplotype characterization (through PCR) in a representative oligo-metastatic colorectal cancer patient (ID: PAT2).
